name: Twilight Ninja Jogen
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>黄</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>たそ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>昏</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>がれ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>忍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>にん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>者</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－ジョウゲン
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
If your "Ninja" monster attacks a Defense Position monster, inflict piercing battle damage to your opponent.

[ Monster Effect ] 
You can reveal 1 "Ninjitsu Art" card in your hand; Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card attacks a Defense Position monster, inflict piercing battle damage.
pend_eff: If your "Ninja" monster attacks a Defense Position monster, inflict piercing battle damage to your opponent.
mnst_eff: You can reveal 1 "Ninjitsu Art" card in your hand; Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card attacks a Defense Position monster, inflict piercing battle damage.
eff: You can reveal 1 "Ninjitsu Art" card in your hand; Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card attacks a Defense Position monster, inflict piercing battle damage.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
